scripts.build: rm -rf client/node_modules server/node_modules client/package-lock.json server/package-lock.json package-lock.json && corepack enable && corepack prepare yarn@1.22.22 --activate && yarn --cwd client install --network-timeout 600000 && yarn --cwd client build && yarn --cwd server install --network-timeout 600000
scripts.start: corepack enable && corepack prepare yarn@1.22.22 --activate && yarn --cwd server start
